title: insert and get
instruction: Create a HashMap with &str keys and i32 values. Insert "Alice" -> 30 and "Bob" -> 25. Print the value for "Alice" (use .get().unwrap() or .get().copied().unwrap_or(0)).

title: contains_key and entry
instruction: Given a map with "go" -> 2009 and "python" -> 1991, check if "go" exists and print "found" or "not found". Then use .entry("java").or_insert(0) and print the value for "java".
hint: if langs.contains_key("go") { println!("found"); } else { println!("not found"); }
